gt_sql: SELECT T1.last_name, T1.position FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T2.expense_date = '2019-09-10' AND T2.expense_description = 'Pizza'
pred_sql:
SELECT m.last_name, m.position 
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Pizza' 
AND e.expense_date = '2019-09-10';
question: What is the last name and position of the student that bought pizza on 09/10/2019?
